use_cases: Landing page hero sections requiring animated background effects
Full-viewport decorative backgrounds for marketing websites
Abstract ambient visuals for splash screens
Brand presentation backgrounds with gradient color schemes
Loading screens or transition overlays with animated elements
ai_summary: An animated SVG background component featuring multiple gradient blobs (pink, yellow, cyan) that smoothly morph and move using CSS/SVG animations. The component uses radial gradients with animated focal points and positioned rectangles with rotation/translate animations running on different durations for a layered, organic feel. Designed as a decorative full-viewport background with no user interaction, commonly used in landing pages and hero sections.
